data.heading: My Projects
data.tagline: Just some simple things I'm playing around with.

featured.alt: A cozy desk setup with coffee and plants
featured.title: Building the Perfect Cozy Desk Setup
featured.description: I'm slowly curating the ultimate work corner — warm lighting, a plant that's still alive, and just enough space for coffee and scribbles.

featured.title: Mastering the Perfect Pour Over
featured.description: After countless trials, I'm getting closer to the ideal brew. Temperature, grind size, and patience — it's a delicate dance.

items.title: Looking for My Mug
items.description: Still searching for my favorite green coffee cup. Let me know if you see it.

items.title: Cleaning My Desk
items.description: Trying to tidy up my workspace so I have more room for snacks.

items.title: Trying New Coffee
items.description: Testing out a few different coffee bags from the local market.

items.alt: A laptop on a clean desk
items.title: Unplugging More
items.description: Trying to spend an hour a day without looking at any screens.
